creator: a-burghardt@gmx.de
text:
I removed a Job-it (2.0 USB, 1GB) USB-Stick from its slot while a file copy to this stick was still in progress. The result was an immidiate reboot of FreeBSD without syncing or unmounting any logal file systems.
